headline: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Finlay Minerals announces the commencement of its 2026 Exploration Programs on its PIL & ATTY Properties
summary: Finlay Minerals Ltd. (TSXV: FYL) (OTCQB: FYMNF) ("Finlay" or the "Company") is pleased to report the start of its exploration programs on the PIL & ATTY Properties in the Toodoggone mining district of British Columbia.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Freeport-McMoRan, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Garchitorena   maintains Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $77 to $80.
